ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-18-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-28-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Eric Stone appeared in person for and with Frederick McClure in person.

The court stated that it reviewed the petition and all of the declarations that were submitted regarding efforts made to ascertain whether there are any heirs of the decedent. Mr. Stone stated that he had nothing to add. The court stated that it appears a search has been made and that it has been sufficient for the court to grant the petition. There being no objections, the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is under submission with the court's intent to grant. The will dated January 16, 1992 is admitted to probate. Frederick William McClure is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for January 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed before January 11, 2023, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
